description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7 Docker image with a cache on vendor/. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs pip install hyde then hyde gen, and runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs pip install hyde then hyde gen -d public, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
